mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pg_collect_item_status (instance_id,frequency,item_code,status,reason,duration_ms,row_count, consecutive_failures,last_success_at,collected_at) VALUES
(#{instanceId},#{it.frequency},#{it.itemCode},#{it.status},#{it.reason}, #{it.durationMs},#{it.rowCount},CASE WHEN #{it.status}='success' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN #{it.status}='success' THEN to_timestamp(#{it.collectedAtMillis}/1000.0) ELSE NULL END, to_timestamp(#{it.collectedAtMillis}/1000.0))
ON CONFLICT (instance_id,frequency,item_code) DO UPDATE SET status=EXCLUDED.status,reason=EXCLUDED.reason,duration_ms=EXCLUDED.duration_ms, row_count=EXCLUDED.row_count, consecutive_failures=CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.status='success' THEN 0 ELSE pg_collect_item_status.consecutive_failures+1 END, last_success_at=CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.status='success' THEN EXCLUDED.collected_at ELSE pg_collect_item_status.last_success_at END, collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at
